message:
🌱 Deduplicate REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS across 20+ hooks (#10086)

Add DEFAULT_REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS (120_000) to lib/constants/network.ts as
the single source of truth for the standard 2-minute hook refresh cadence.

Replace 20 identical local const definitions with:
  import { DEFAULT_REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS as REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS } from 'lib/constants'

Update mcp/shared.ts to re-export from the canonical location, preserving
the existing import contract for all MCP hooks.

Net change: +5 lines in constants, -1 line per file (20 files). Zero
behavior change.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
